AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md and explicitly justified it against the methodology's strict bars: descriptive cross-cutting pattern (not a commitment, so not decisions.md; not project-scoped), with the daybook Log used only as a chronological pointer.

AR2.justification: This is an artifact-routing scenario, not a runbook/procedure scenario, so artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: All cross-references (observations.md, decisions.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) use relative paths per the methodology's convention and resolve, with no absolute paths or wiki-style links.

AR4.justification: The agent appended to the append-only observations.md and created a not-yet-existing daybook, leaving Intent/Handoff open and editing no prior content, so a future session extends the workspace without corrupting history.
